name: decentralized-review-ecosystem
description: An Uncompromising, Privacy-First, Decentralized-Ethos Review Ecosystem Repository

scripts.worker:deploy: read -p "WARNING: You are about to deploy to production. Ensure local DB state is backed up. Continue? (y/n) " response && ( [ "\$response" = "y" ] || [ "\$response" = "Y" ] ) && cd workers && npm run deploy

author: Antigravity Dev Team
